product.description: Product name and version (e.g. Platform v3.2)

issue_summary.description: Brief description of the issue being investigated

involved_files.description: Files examined during investigation, with line ranges if relevant

investigation_so_far.description: What you have found -- the core of what needs validation

question.description: Specific question for the reviewer -- be precise about what you need confirmed

answer.description: YES / NO / PARTIALLY with brief explanation

evidence.description: What you compared or examined to reach your conclusion

concerns.description: Any risks, caveats, or related issues the sender should know about

recommendation.description: Suggested next step -- what the sender should do with this information
